ageGate.title: When were you born?
ageGate.subtitle: We use your date of birth to set the right protections for your account.
ageGate.errorFuture: Date of birth cannot be in the future.
ageGate.parentRequiredDescription: Because you're under 18, a parent or guardian needs to set up your account with you.
ageGate.coppaWarning: Children under 13 require verifiable parental consent before any data is collected. Your parent or guardian will need to complete a verification step.

parentalConsent.title: Parental consent
parentalConsent.subtitle: Choose how you'd like to verify your identity as the parent or guardian.

method.paper_pdf: Signed PDF + photo of government ID

parentalConsent.submittedBody: We'll email you when your verification is approved.

childSetup.title: Welcome
childSetup.body: Your parent set up your account. Here's what's on and off.

consent.title: What can we use?
consent.subtitle: Each row is a category of data. Each column is a purpose. Nothing is on by default.

welcome.title: You're all set
welcome.body: Pair your camera and start your first session whenever you're ready.

diagnosticBanner.title: Diagnostic feed (preview)
diagnosticBanner.body: Live shot diagnostics are rolling out. We'll let you know when your account is included.

capturePhone.title: Phone capture (dev)
capturePhone.subtitle: Internal: records to a local MP4 for dataset collection. Hero 13 remains the product camera.

status.permissionDenied: Camera permission denied. Enable it in Settings to continue.

capturePhone.noCamera: No back-facing camera available on this device.
